calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Schwarz for and wtih Larry Williams (Petitioner).

Mr. Schwarz provided an endorsed copy of the Amended Proof of Service that was filed on May 3, 2013, and stated that he and the Executor were prepared to submit the matter on the pleadings. The Court denied the request for extraordinary fees to the Attorney and reduced the Executor's statutory fees by $2,500.00 (half of the Accountants fees). The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to receipt and review of a revised order).
Mr. Schwarz is to submit a revised order reflecting the above.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
